title: FAMILY MEDICINE - 211info
text: SANTIAM MEDICAL CLINIC FAMILY MEDICINE Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides adult wellness and preventive care along with pediatric care and supports acute and chronic health management. 280 S First Avenue Mill City, OR 97360 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: Monday-Thursday 8am-5pm (503) 897-4100 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (503) 897-4100 INTAKE PROCEDURE: Walk in, call, or visit website for more information FEES: OHP and most insurance accepted. Payment plan and financial assistance may be available. DOCUMENTS: Insurance information, if applicable AREA SERVED: Marion County SITE HOURS: Monday-Friday 7am-5pm Services: Childhood Immunization Community Clinics Family and Community Medicine HPV Immunizations Vaccine Information If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service.
